creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 152851
Makefile with CPE information added

Haproxy has had vulnerabilities with a CVE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2013-2175). This patch adds CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[1].


[0] https://web.nvd.nist.gov/view/vuln/detail?vulnId=CVE-2013-2175
[1] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
